content_markdown: Which of the following correctly shows the changes, if any, in the potential energy and in the kinetic energy of the molecules of a solid as it melts?

diagram_metadata.description: A table with two columns titled 'Potential energy' and 'Kinetic energy' corresponding to options A, B, C, and D.

options.label: A
options.text: Potential energy: Decreases; Kinetic energy: Increases

options.label: B
options.text: Potential energy: Increases; Kinetic energy: Stays the same

options.label: C
options.text: Potential energy: Stays the same; Kinetic energy: Decreases

options.label: D
options.text: Potential energy: Stays the same; Kinetic energy: Stays the same

vibe_explanation: During a phase change such as melting, the temperature remains constant, which means the average kinetic energy of the molecules does not change. However, energy is being supplied to break the intermolecular bonds, which increases the potential energy of the molecules.
